event_description: A compact commercial fishing boat with visible rigging is tracked through close and wide views. The vessel maneuvers with a curved or changing wake, and IR preserves the warm hull and wake relation.

qa.question: Around 00:10 EO, which screen-side hull/wake relation is visible?

options.A: hull on the right side of the wake; white wake extending to the left
options.B: hull on the left side of the wake; white wake extending to the right
options.C: hull below the wake; white wake extending upward
options.D: hull above the wake; white wake extending downward

qa.evidence_note: rigging and a curved or changing wake remain tied to the compact hull

qa.question: Around 00:30 EO, which motion layout is visible?

options.A: boat at the top/front of the bright trail; wake trailing toward screen bottom
options.B: boat at the right/front of the bright trail; wake trailing toward screen left
options.C: boat at the left/front of the bright trail; wake trailing toward screen right
options.D: boat at the bottom/front of the bright trail; wake trailing toward screen top

qa.evidence_note: rigging and a curved or changing wake remain tied to the compact hull

qa.question: Around 00:30 IR, which hull/wake thermal layout is visible?

options.A: bright hull near the right side; broader wake texture spreading leftward
options.B: bright hull near the left side; broader wake texture spreading rightward
options.C: bright hull near the bottom side; broader wake texture spreading upward
options.D: bright hull near the top side; broader wake texture spreading downward

qa.evidence_note: the warm hull and wake relation persists during the maneuver

qa.question: Around 00:50 EO, which V-wake layout creates the nearby path cue?

options.A: boat at the lower-left end; wake arms opening toward the upper-right side
options.B: boat at the lower-right end; wake arms opening toward the upper-left side
options.C: boat at the upper-left end; wake arms opening toward the lower-right side
options.D: boat at the upper-right end; wake arms opening toward the lower-left side

qa.evidence_note: confusing the curved wake with a different path or second vessel

qa.question: Around 00:50, which EO/IR wake-position match is visible?

options.A: EO: hull at upper-left with wake opening lower-right; IR: bright hull at upper-left with textured wake lower-right
options.B: EO: hull at lower-right with wake opening upper-left; IR: bright hull at lower-right with textured wake upper-left
options.C: EO: hull at upper-right with wake opening lower-left; IR: bright hull at upper-right with textured wake lower-left
options.D: EO: hull at lower-left with wake opening upper-right; IR: bright hull at lower-left with textured wake upper-right

qa.evidence_note: EO: rigging and a curved or changing wake remain tied to the compact hull; IR: the warm hull and wake relation persists during the maneuver

qa.question: Around 01:00 EO, which framing relation appears?

options.A: boat near the upper center; two wake bands extending downward behind it
options.B: boat near the lower center; two wake bands extending upward behind it
options.C: boat near the left center; two wake bands extending rightward behind it
options.D: boat near the right center; two wake bands extending leftward behind it

qa.evidence_note: rigging and a curved or changing wake remain tied to the compact hull

qa.question: Around 01:00, which EO/IR direction match is visible?

options.A: EO: boat lower in frame with wake above it; IR: bright hull lower in frame with wake texture above it
options.B: EO: boat right in frame with wake to the left; IR: bright hull right in frame with wake texture to the left
options.C: EO: boat left in frame with wake to the right; IR: bright hull left in frame with wake texture to the right
options.D: EO: boat upper in frame with wake below it; IR: bright hull upper in frame with wake texture below it

qa.evidence_note: EO: rigging and a curved or changing wake remain tied to the compact hull; IR: the warm hull and wake relation persists during the maneuver

qa.question: Around 01:30 EO, which close-pass screen orientation is visible?

options.A: bow/front points to the left; white wake exits to the right
options.B: bow/front points to the right; white wake exits to the left
options.C: bow/front points upward; white wake exits downward
options.D: bow/front points downward; white wake exits upward

qa.evidence_note: confusing the curved wake with a different path or second vessel

qa.question: Around 01:30 IR, which side-on thermal relation is visible?

options.A: bright hull profile toward the bottom; darker wake trail toward the top
options.B: bright hull profile toward the left; darker wake trail toward the right
options.C: bright hull profile toward the top; darker wake trail toward the bottom
options.D: bright hull profile toward the right; darker wake trail toward the left

qa.evidence_note: the warm hull and wake relation persists during the maneuver

qa.question: Around 01:40 EO, which direction relation appears?

options.A: boat heading toward the upper-right; wake trailing lower-left
options.B: boat heading toward the lower-left; wake trailing upper-right
options.C: boat heading toward the upper-left; wake trailing lower-right
options.D: boat heading toward the lower-right; wake trailing upper-left

qa.evidence_note: rigging and a curved or changing wake remain tied to the compact hull

qa.question: Around 01:40, which combined EO/IR direction account is visible?

options.A: EO: boat ahead toward lower-right; IR: bright hull ahead of darker strands to upper-left
options.B: EO: boat ahead toward lower-left; IR: bright hull ahead of darker strands to upper-right
options.C: EO: boat ahead toward upper-right; IR: bright hull ahead of darker strands to lower-left
options.D: EO: boat ahead toward upper-left; IR: bright hull ahead of darker strands to lower-right

qa.evidence_note: EO: rigging and a curved or changing wake remain tied to the compact hull; IR: the warm hull and wake relation persists during the maneuver

qa.question: At the end of the clip, which full-frame cue chain is visible?

options.A: boat near the left center; wake column extending rightward through the frame
options.B: boat near the lower center; wake column extending upward through the frame
options.C: boat near the right center; wake column extending leftward through the frame
options.D: boat near the upper center; wake column extending downward through the frame

qa.evidence_note: EO: rigging and a curved or changing wake remain tied to the compact hull; IR: the warm hull and wake relation persists during the maneuver

group_scoring_recommendation.C1: Use squared-ratio consistency scoring for the eight-step parallel cue chain.
group_scoring_recommendation.H1: Prefer prefix scoring because the four questions form a cue-chain verdict.

notes.annotation_visibility_warning: Do not export main_event, event_description, answer, option_roles, evidence_note, rationales, or time_reference metadata to model prompts.
notes.design_revision_note: Video-reasoning v15 text-gate repair r2: options are neutral cue-pair choices with same-scene distractors, reducing answerability from wording alone.
acceptance_gates: Run request key-path leakage audit after export.
Run Qwen text-only/no-video baseline before video inference.
Reject samples or templates whose text-only accuracy suggests wording shortcuts.
Keep evidence_note fields internal; they are for annotation audit only.
